gate.name: Product Surfaces, Research Rebinding, And Promotion Proof

closureCriteria.criterion: Terminal/Exchange/acquire surfaces reflect V27 tokenomics and minimal crypto functionality without claiming V28 market depth
evidence: uapi/components/base/bitcode/btd/BTDPrices.tsx labels Terminal Need and minimal Exchange range acquisition as V27
uapi/app/(root)/components/MarketingPricingSection.tsx stores both Terminal and Exchange acquisition paths as V27 while preserving later-version market-depth boundaries
uapi/components/base/bitcode/btd/btd-tracker.tsx routes acquisition intent through Terminal Need minting or minimal Exchange range transfer

closureCriteria.criterion: token/range route shows range, policy, and rights disclosure
evidence: uapi/app/btd/[assetPackId]/page.tsx provides an unversioned AssetPack range page
the route surfaces rangeStart/rangeEndExclusive, access policy id/hash, owner-read/licensed-read branch, proof root, and source manifest root

closureCriteria.criterion: web research agenda for cryptographic concepts and library optionality is complete and rebound
evidence: .bitcode/v27-crypto-library-research-proof.json records primary-source choices and adapter-level optionality
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md generated as the V27 closure appendix
.bitcode/v27-total-closure-proof.json maps expected generated proof families to gate artifacts or accepted equivalents

closureCriteria.criterion: parity matrix has no blocking rows
evidence: remaining non-promotion work is explicitly deferred or operational rather than blocking V27 promotion
commercial API route wrappers remain under uapi/app/api/btd/*
external realization and local executor routes were ported from version-prefixed paths to unversioned uapi/app/api/external-realization and uapi/app/api/executors/[interfaceId]

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 ORM slice.
ts-jest globals deprecation warning is pre-existing.
Build reports pre-existing Browserslist staleness and @ai-sdk/google optional-resolution warning from generic-llms.
No versioned UAPI API routes returned.
